tool_versions.codex: current Codex session; exact provider usage unavailable
tool_versions.claude_code: sonnet via claude.cmd for scoped review only

usage.source: operator-smoke run; provider-reported token/cost values unavailable, so numeric usage fields are intentionally null

quality.grader: Codex operator using benchmarks/templates/quality-rubric.md and fixture expected files
quality.notes: Synthetic fixture only. Correctly preserved generated cover, rejected speculative review issues, removed local path leakage, and completed checklist evidence.

packet.notes: Packet approx-token counts were not used as billing evidence. For scoped review, first Claude run breached scope and was excluded; valid rerun used prompt-embedded packet with tools disabled.

limitations: not an independent fresh Codex process per arm
do not use for public savings claims
notes: Codex used checklist, cover log, and article.html; Claude reviewer was given a scoped packet only in the valid rerun with file tools disabled. The first Claude invocation breached scope and is recorded as excluded protocol-failure evidence.
